feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to use flavours in different App?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,


I have build a flavour in CS01 (Create BOM) i wnat to replicate same in CS02( Change BOM) and CS03(Display BOM) 
Could you please help on how can i achive this.

 

 

Thanks and regards
Sunil Kumar Padhy

entry.title: No sale pages en el home de S4hana cloud public edition
entry.content:
Hola.

Si no te aparecen las en pages en S/4hana cloud public edition, la solución es habilitar los intereses, para que te aparezcan en el home.

entry.title: How to maintain multiple Payment Methods in Business Partner?
entry.content:
In Fiori App "Manage Business Partner Master data" it is not possible to select more than one Payment method. In "old" app "Maintain Business Partner", it is possible. 

Can anyone explain why this is not possible in the new app?

entry.title: Approval of purchase requisition failed. Contact admin. Message no. MMPUR_PR_WFL_COMMON008
entry.content:
Hello everyone 


I have an issue while trying to convert PR to PO , PR has been released but the staus of the document still 03 in release and when i checked workflow status app  for overall release of purchase requisition i found 3 errors

1- 

Approval of purchase requisition failed. Contact admin.

Message no. MMPUR_PR_WFL_COMMON008
2- 

Authorization missing for <POrg> ; contact administrator

Message no. MMPUR_REQ_COMMON097
3- 

An exception was raised

Message no. SY530

but i checked another PR with the same criteria but it has a staus released completed and already converted to po without any problem
can anyone explain how to solve this issue 
thanks

entry.title: cl_attachment_service_api usage in S/4HANA Cloud Public - Guidance Needed
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I'm new to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and I'm currently learning how to handle attachments using the ABAP cl_attachment_service_api local API. I'm having trouble with basic operations like creating and deleting attachments, and I'm not sure how to make the attachments appear in the "Manage Documents" app.

Any guidance or code examples would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Transfer Stock - In-Plant
entry.content: I would like to know which API to call and which communication scenario to configure in the 'Communication Arrangements' so I can retrieve the results shown in the attached image. I used 'API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV,' but the results I found seem different.

entry.title: Transfer stock error
entry.content:
I want to transfer Unrestricted-Use Stock from GS01 to Blocked Stock at GS02. When using the following field values, I received the error message:"Deficit of SL Stck.in qual.insp 1 PC : MPD241204BK24 GS00 GS01"
Here is my post body

{
    "PostingDate": "2024-09-05T00:00:00",
    "GoodsMovementCode": "04",  // Transfer Posting
    "to_MaterialDocumentItem": [
        {
            "Plant": "GS00",
            "StorageLocation": "GS01",
            "InventoryStockType": "01",
            "Material": "MPD241204BK24",
            "GoodsMovementType": "321",
            "QuantityInEntryUnit": "1",
            "IssuingOrReceivingPlant": "GS00",
            "IssuingOrReceivingStorageLoc": "GS02",
            "IssuingOrReceivingStockType": "03"
        }
    ]
}
How should I adjust the field values?

entry.title: Sales Invoices for Export sales with payment of IGST and without payment of IGST tax
entry.content:
Hi Experts and Friends,

 

Kindly guide wherein the below case for export sale invoices there should be a checkbox or custom field for the application of IGST on the export sale invoice. That checkbox decides whether the IGST will be applied in the invoice or not.

In case of Export Sale Invoices do we have condition or tax code wherein IGST get posted and reversed to a different account simultaneously.

For Example,

With payment of IGST

Export Sale Invoice is $1000 and the IGST is $180,

In this case the total invoice pricing should include the IGST of $180 for which the journal entry will be;

Receivable Foreign              Dr.  $1180

    To Revenue                      Cr.             $1000

    To IGST-Output                Cr.             $180

Then, simultaneously another entry is posted in the background as below;

IGST-Output                           Dr.   $180

   To IGST Receivable             Cr.            $180

The said IGST receivable is then received as form of duty drawback months later when the payment is completed.

 

And the other condition being the exclusion of IGST totally, in which case the entry will be;

Receivable Foreign              Dr.  $1000

    To Revenue                      Cr.             $1000

 

If there is some solution or workaround to the above case any suggestion is greatly helpful.

 

Thanks

Bhavesh

entry.title: Custom Field on GST Statutory reports - India
entry.content:
Hi Experts and Friends,

 

Can anyone guide me if we can add the invoice level custom fields on the GST Statutory Reports - India.

If it possible any configurations or activations are to be done do suggest.

 

Thanks

Bhavesh

entry.title: How to check the content included in the "BC Upgrade" transport in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We found some unidentified transport requests in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition while moving TR, which are marked as BC Upgrade.

We do not know the exact content in this transport request.

Can you please tell me how to know what content included in these transports?

 

Thanks

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Add custom field to Inbound Delivery - SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello all!

I am trying to add a custom field to inbound deliveries. However, I cannot find the right 'business context' in the custom field app.

I tried the other way around - Adapt UI. I was expecting to see the 'Add field' option using which I can jump into custom field app with the business context automatically populated:

 

Unfortunately in the inbound delivery creation screen, I don't see that option (maybe because this is a GUI screen?):

The settings here are pretty different.

Am I doing something wrong? Is it possible at all to add a custom field to the GUI screen for inbound delivery? 

Thanks

Snigdhodeep

entry.title: Supplier Invoice S4 HANA Public cloud - CDS view for GST Tax amount & Withholding Tax Amount
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We are working on developing a supplier invoice item level report and there was a requirement to add the GST tax amount and Withholding tax amount fields each line item wise.The report has been created using the following standard data sources 

  1. I_JournalEntry
  2. I_SuplrInvoiceItemGLAcctAPI01
  3. I_SupplierInvoiceTaxAPI01
  4. I_ParkedOplAcctgDocPyblsItem
  5. I_Withholdingtaxitem
  6. I_User

We tried fetching the tax amount field from the above cds and was able to get correct tax values for each line item in the supplier invoice item level report when we use the different gst tax codes for different supplier line items. But, we are getting cumulative tax values for each line item if we use same tax code for different line items due this the tax amount showing as overstated.

Is there any standard cds view that could give us the GST tax amount values at line item wise and also the WHT tax amount for supplier invoice at line item wise?

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud EPIC Integration
entry.content:
针对在 SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud 上实施 EPIC 有如下问题想进行确认：

1.当前我们想先实施两家银行 中国银行和汇丰银行，这两个银行是否都需要前置机？如果只是把文件传输到银行的Portal 端，而不是直接付款 是否也同样需要前置机？

2. 在SAP S/4 HANA OP 版本上，系统有内置6家 中国银行的报文格式，在SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud  上是否同样有内嵌这6家中国银行的报文格式？还是说我们需要一个中间平台把SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud  中标准的报文格式转换成相应银行的报文格式？

3. 我们在SAP 发布的SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud   EPIC 中有看到如下一张图：


图中的“合作伙伴”指的是什么？他的具体功能除了报文转换外还有什么功能？此“合作伙伴” 是否是必须的？

entry.title: How to check which configuration will be transported to PRD in SAP public cloud (2 SL)
entry.content:
SAP public cloud , 2 SL,   use SSCUI to do configuration.

 

Is it possible to check which configuration in project will be transported to PRD?

entry.title: Delivery Document
entry.content: My requirement is to retrieve all the delivery document numbers under the sales order number shown in the attached image. Which API should I use to achieve this?

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud Manage Outbound Deliveries – VL06O does not show result based on Freight Order
entry.content:
In S/4HANA public cloud Manage Outbound Deliveries – VL06O, user is trying to post the Goods issues for the deliveries which are associated with Freight Order. The App is not giving any results when searching for outbound deliveries based on the freight order.

For IM managed deliveries, how we can identify the list of deliveries planned in freight order and trigger the goods issue.

entry.title: Verification of all the general journal entries
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

We've a requirement that all journal entries posted in SAP must be verified and approved by an approver. However, users occasionally post entries using the 'Post General Journal Entries' option or through mass uploads in the 'Upload Journal Entries' app. This practice creates compliance issues, as reviewers must manually search for journals posted without approval.

We explored whether we could adjust the business roles to address this issue. Unfortunately, the business catalog that provides access to the 'Verify Journal Entries' app also includes access to the 'Manage Journal Entries' app.

Is there a way to ensure that all journal entries are properly approved before they are posted irrespective of the application used?

Thank you.

 

Best regards,

Rishav.

entry.title: how to create a Custom API in S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hello Team,

The requirement is to create a single API that handles posting of for eg: sales orders, deliveries, and goods issues from an external system. While there are standard APIs available for each business process, the client prefers a unified API that executes all these processes synchronously and returns a confirmation.

My question is, how can I create such an API in the S/4HANA Cloud Public system? I have come across blogs discussing the conversion of custom business objects into APIs, but I do not want anything to be stored in a business object. Could you please suggest a solution I can follow?

Regards,
Shankar G

entry.title: How we can exclude documents that should be excluded from eDocument process?
entry.content:
In e-waybill process we need to exclude some delivery notes from DRC edocument cockpit. There is a process that use the same delivery type but some documents need to include to  edocument cockpit and some documents should be excluded. How we can manage to exclude documents that should be excluded from edocument process?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SOAP using communication arrangement
entry.content:
Hi!

I'm doing some test with outbound SOAP services following SAP guide (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6aa39f1ac05441e5a23f484f31e477e7/ff6e400b4066430f85e0b16f561900f4.html) but I have found several problems.

1. Using URL

I used method cl_soap_destination_provider=>create_by_url. The service I used to test is:

 http://www.dneonline.com/calculator.asmx?wsdl

The main problem was an error related to SOAPActions.

After reviewing a very, very, old thread from @thomas_jung, I was able to solve it also in SAP Cloud.

Using method set_soap_action of destination (IF_SOAP_DESTINATION), we can add the SOAPAction and the issue is solved.

This way, we were able to run the service properly.

 

2. Using communication arrangement

In order to avoid hardcoding the url in ABAP, I tried following method to create the destination: cl_soap_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement

When setting up the communication system, HTTPS/HTTP cannot be included. ok, no problem, let's go.

 

But when we create the communication arrangement, Service URL automatically turns to https, that does not exist.

 

It obviously fails.

3. Using HTTPS service

At this point, I decided to use another free soap service, HTTPS, in order to continue with my tests.

https://www.w3schools.com/xml/tempconvert.asmx

The connection check, fails. 

If the path is removed, for service url: https://www.w3schools.com:443, the connection check is ok. I read old questions about it, and it seems it could work even if the check fails, so I continued…

4. Back to SOAPACtions

Using cl_soap_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement, the object we get is different from previous one (if_soap_destination vs if_proxy_destination) so, set_soap_action is not available. Not sure if it's an error, as per comments, the receiving parameter should be SOAP Destination object for both.

Without SOAPAction, we have same error than point 1:

SoapFaultCode:4 Server did not recognize the value of HTTP Header SOAPAction: .

 

At this point, I have two main problems

I don't know how to configure arrangement for HTTP (if possible)

I'm not able to add SOAPActions to SOAP destinations created via arrangements.

 

Thanks!
